title: Billy vocab list — 70+ Spanish words for talking with Billy (likely father-in-law context)
html:
Billy vocab list — 70+ Spanish words for talking with Billy (likely father-in-law context)

Source: 2026-01-29 Apple Note. A 70-word Spanish vocabulary list Yahir built for conversations with someone named Billy — vocabulary skews toward life-philosophy + business + body parts. Written ~1 week before the Emily Spanish assignment.

TL;DR

  • Working bilingual list — English ↔ Spanish for ~70 terms.
  • Categorical clusters reveal the conversation topics:
    • Life-philosophy: effort/esfuerzo, pursuit/persigue, truth/verdad, at-the-end-of-the-day/al-fin-del-día, decisions/decisiones, depends/depende, sympathy/sympathia, pain/dolor.
    • Business: business/negocio, administration/administración, career/carrera, require/requerido, started/impece, sign/firmar, approach/approache.
    • Body: foot/pie/pata, leg/pierna, skin/piel, hurt/lastamar.
    • Family/identity: catholic/catholico, upbringing/crece, appreciate/aprecio.
    • Substances: inject/inyectar, vice/vicio, venom/veneno.
  • The vocabulary shape suggests hybrid life-story + values + Body/medical conversation — quite possibly Yahir prepping to talk with Emily's family / Billy specifically about life and trajectory.
  • 5 days before Yahir helps Emily with her Spanish assignment — strongly suggests Billy is in the Emily orbit (her father? grandfather? family contact?).

Pattern observed

Yahir's conversation-prep mode: build a vocab cheat-sheet specific to a known interlocutor (Billy) and topic-set. Same pattern as his Chinese conversational phrase prep from late 2024 — vocabulary tailored to a named relationship.

Notable that the list starts with "effort - esfuerzo" — Yahir leading with the word that defines his self-image (max effort commit).

Open questions

  • Who is Billy? Emily's dad? Grandfather? The "Billy" in Emily's family context, given the 5-day gap before the Emily Spanish assignment, is the strongest hypothesis.
  • Did the conversation happen? Was it a meeting? Phone call?
  • Note last-modified March 6 — Yahir kept adding words for over a month, suggesting recurring or escalating Billy contact.
